Available for opportunities

Sarvysh D Hulani

Explorer Builder BITS Pilani
I am a

Engineering student at BITS Pilani, exploring finance, AI, and the ideas that shape how things actually work — and building in public while I do it. I follow questions wherever they lead — investment banking, AI tools, how great businesses get built — and I'd rather understand something deeply and build with it than collect credentials and call that understanding.

I'm designing my own education to understand the world more deeply—and documenting the process of becoming through curiosity, not certainty

View My WorkDownload ResumeAbout Me

Studying at

BITS Pilani

Focus

Finance & Consulting

Scroll
01

Projects

Featured Projects

Things I am building right now. Each project is a step toward becoming the engineer I want to be.

In Progress

AI Study Companion

An AI-powered study companion built for BITS Pilani students. Uses RAG with fine-tuned embeddings to answer course-specific questions.

▲ Reduced avg. time-to-answer for course queries from 40 min to under 90 sec in pilot testing with 20 students.

Python LangChain FastAPI PostgreSQL
#AI#Education#RAG
Read more
Shipped

Stock Sentiment Analyzer

A real-time sentiment analysis tool that tracks financial news and social media to predict short-term stock movements.

▲ Achieved 68% directional accuracy on 30-day backtest across 50 mid-cap stocks; 3× better than random baseline.

Python Transformers Streamlit Pandas
#Finance#NLP#Data
Read more
Shipped

Campus Connect

A platform connecting BITS Pilani students for skill-sharing, project collaboration, and mentorship.

▲ Onboarded 80+ students in first month; 12 project collaborations formed within 6 weeks of launch.

Next.js Supabase TailwindCSS
#Product#Community#Web
Read more

From Messy Data to Database Design — CommBank Data Science Job Simulation

Completed Commonwealth Bank's Forage data science simulation — cleaned and filtered a real transactional dataset, anonymised sensitive customer info, then designed a relational database to track tweets, replies, quote retweets, and mentions.

#Data Analyst #Microsoft Excel#Data Science
Read more
View All Projects

02

Now

What I'm Doing Right Now

A living snapshot of my current focus, updated as things change.

Currently Building

An AI-powered study companion for BITS students

Currently Learning

How to understand and analyze annual reports.

Currently Reading

The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel

Current Goal

Ship three production-grade AI projects before semester end

Current Semester

Third Semester, BITS Pilani

Current Experiments

Testing fine-tuned embeddings vs. OpenAI embeddings for domain-specific RAG

03

About

The beginning of a story

I was the kid who took things apart before I understood how they went together. Radios, old motors, whatever I could get my hands on — and then too many books, always reaching a little past what I could actually digest. Most people grow out of that phase. I never did. I just got better tools.

— Sarvysh D Hulani

Interests

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Product Design & UX Investing & Financial Markets Philosophy & Psychology Cricket & Chess Science Fiction & Worldbuilding
Read My Full Story

Curiosity Over Comfort

I choose the harder path when it teaches me more.

Build in Public

Ideas are cheap. Shipping is everything. I document as I go.

Depth Over Breadth

I go deep on the things that matter rather than skimming everything.

Genuine Always

No personas, no pretending. What you see is what you get.

A few years, a few failures, a lot of lessons — see the full journey .

Explore More

Knowledge

Knowledge Hub

A searchable collection of everything I learn. Notes, research, and insights organized by topic.

Engineering
Intermediate

System Design Basics for AI Engineers

Essential system design concepts every AI engineer should know.

#System Design#Architecture#Scalability
AI
Intermediate

Understanding Transformers: A Deep Dive

A comprehensive guide to understanding the Transformer architecture that powers modern AI.

#Deep Learning#NLP#Transformers
Explore Knowledge Hub
06

Resources

Resource Library

Curated learning resources that have shaped my thinking. Each one comes with personal notes.

AI Advanced
Essential

Attention Is All You Need

The paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. A must-read for anyone in AI.

Read this multiple times. Each time I understand something new. The key insight is that attention replaces recurrence entirely.

Visit Resource
AI Intermediate
Highly Recommended

Designing Machine Learning Systems

Chip Huyen comprehensive guide to ML systems design. Covers everything from data pipelines to deployment.

The best book on practical ML I have read. The chapters on feature stores and model monitoring are gold.

Visit Resource
Browse All Resources

08

Reading

Reading

Books that shaped my thinking. Notes, quotes, and ratings included.

Reading

Designing Machine Learning Systems

Chip Huyen

The most practical ML book I have found. Covers the entire ML lifecycle from data to deployment.

"The goal of ML is not to build models but to build systems that create value."

Finished

Zero to One

Peter Thiel

A short but dense book. The core idea: true innovation means creating something entirely new, not iterating on what exists.

"Competition is for losers. Monopolies are good for everyone."

View All Books
